speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Bas rona ruk hi nahi raha, dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai. Khet ke medh par baitha hoon aur andar se sab toot sa gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sequential mein Lens F se emotional flooding mirror karna, content detail push na karna.
text: Is pal tum par itna tez dukh aur bhar-bhar ke wave aa rahi hai ki sambhalna bahut mushkil lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Haan, bas rona ruk hi nahi raha. Khana tak nahi khaya ja raha, sirf andhera sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se overwhelmed state ki continuity mirror karna.
text: Kaafi der se yeh bhari halat bina rukke chal rahi hai, isliye sharir aur mann dono thak gaye lagte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meeting mein boss ne sabke saamne mujhe gawar bola aur layoff ki dhamki di. Tab se bas bezatti ka jhatka dimag se ja hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear of social collapse softly mirror karna.
text: Us pal ki chot ke saath tumhe yeh bhi lag raha hai ki izzat aur rozgar dono haath se fisal sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Haan, moneylender ka karz aur EMI yaad aati hai toh bas rona ruk hi nahi raha. Aankh band karo tab bhi wahi scene dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm line + Lens C se relational-izzat burden mirror.
text: Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tum akela dukh nahi, ghar ka bojh aur logon ki nazar bhi saath utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, lagta hai sab mitti mein mil gaya. Khet pe baith ke sochta hoon ki main hi bojh ban gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Restatement ke baad grounded one-question se deepest hurt point nikalna.
text: Us scene ka kaunsa tukda sabse zyada chubhta hai - wo shabd, sabke saamne bolna, ya layoff ki dhamki?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabke saamne gawar bolna sabse zyada chubha. Core baat ye hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri izzat toot gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lagta hai ke through unspoken humiliation aur collapse feel reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai us beizzati ne tumhe andar tak hila diya, aur tum khud ko bahut chhota mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, gaon mein pata chala toh log hasenge, isi darr se kisi ko sach nahi bol pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol ke hisaab se short restatement only.
text: Logon ki nazar ka darr tumhe chup rehne pe majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona ruk hi nahi raha
text: Sahi keh rahe ho, chup rehta hoon toh bas rona ruk hi nahi raha. Dil aur bhaari hota ja raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rural employment humiliation context normalize karke worth ko outcome se alag karna.
text: Rural background se aakar job mein public beizzati jhelna bahut gehra lagta hai, aur aisa tootna bilkul insani hai. Tumhari keemat kisi boss ke shabd se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga par aage abhi andhera hi dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once systemic anecdote from similar world to reduce isolation.
text: Kisan parivaar se aaye kaamgaaron mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - beizzati ke baad dimaag blank ho jata hai; sirf tumhara nahi, lekin biradari ke darr se koi bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye koi chhota raasta batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 sub-10-min practical options dena.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 chhote option: (1) 5 minute dhimi saans, 4 gin ke andar 6 gin ke bahar; (2) ek kagaz par sirf karz, EMI, aur turant dene wali rashi alag likho; (3) kisi bharose ke aadmi ko 2 line bhejo: 'haalat heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo sabse asaan lage woh pehle.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans wala kar sakta hoon, abhi saans tez chal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step chalana, ek hi execution turn.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, kandhe dheele chhodo. Phir 4 gin ke saans andar lo, 6 gin ke bahar chhodo, 8 round karo. Phir haath se chhati chhoo ke bolo, 'abhi ek kadam hi kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 round ke baad rona thoda halka hua. Sir bhi pehle se kam bhaari lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe देना कि public insult structural power issue hai, personal worth nahi.
text: Kaam ki jagah par public taane aksar power dikhane ka tareeka hote hain, tumhari asli kimmat ka maapdand nahi. Is baat ko pakadna andar ka bojh halka karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar walon ko kaise bolun, ye abhi bhi mushkil lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do short script options dena jo dignity aur clarity dono rakhein.
text: Do seedhi line rakh lo: (1) 'Office mein bada jhatka laga hai, par main sambhal ke agla kadam le raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam baith ke poora bolunga.' Isse sach bhi rahega aur bojh bhi nahi badhega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chhoti line se thoda control lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-responsibility frame mirror karke agency reinforce karna.
text: Tum zimmedari se hat nahi rahe, bas use sambhalne layak gati mein la rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein phir darr aata hai ki kal kuch na hua toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ke saath Lens E se future fear hold karna.
text: Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Raat mein kal ka anishchit bojh bada dikhne lagta hai, isliye darr tez lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, fir neend toot jati hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip ko normalise karna aur effort ko validate karna.
text: Aise daur mein toot-ti neend aur chipki thakan aam baat hai, koi kamzori ka nishan nahi. Tum jo chhote kadam le rahe ho wahi asli sambhal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, kal ka start ab thoda saaf lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state par concise 3-block next-day plan देना.
text: Kal ka seedha plan: 5 min saans ka reset, 20 min kaam-dhoondh block, 10 min karz-EMI note update. Teen block kaafi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe: transition takes time.
text: Rozgar ke jhatke se nikalna aksar dheere hota hai; chhote lagatar kadam hi lambi daud mein kaam aate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lagta hai dheere-dheere sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki steadiness ko kal continuity se jodna.
text: Aaj ka yeh thehraav kal bhi raha toh bhari wave dheere dheere chhoti padti jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close par do tiny continuation steps dena without extra burden.
text: Sone se pehle 6 dhimi saans lo, phir kal ke 3 block kagaz par tick-box mein likh do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam poora.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main poori tarah overwhelmed hoon, dimaag blank pad gaya hai. Bas wahi humiliation ghoom rahi hai aur kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter

text: Jab kaam pe beizzati, sahukar ka karz, aur EMI saath aayein, aisa tootna bahut natural hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek boss ki rai se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka hai, par aage abhi bhi dhundla dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once systemic anecdote from similar context for de-isolation.
text: Karz aur kaam ka double pressure jhelne wale bahut log yahi bolte hain - insult ke baad dimaag loop mein atak jata hai; sirf tumhara nahi, par badnami ke darr se log chup rehte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhote kadam chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness pe 3 sub-10-min practical options dena.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 chhote option: (1) 5 min dhimi saans; (2) ek kagaz par sirf sahukar/EMI ki turant due line likho; (3) ek bharose ke aadmi ko 2 line bhejo: 'haalat heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo asaan लगे, pehle woh karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans wala kar lunga, abhi saans bhari chal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen breathing suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, kandhe dheele karo. Phir 4 gin ke saans andar lo aur 6 gin ke bahar chhodo, 8 round karo. Phir bolo, 'abhi bas ek kadam'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 round ke baad mann thoda halka hai. Rona bhi kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe देना कि insult structural power issue hai.
text: Kaam ki jagah par public neecha dikhana aksar control dikhane ka tareeka hota hai, tumhari asli aukaat ka sach nahi. Is baat ko pakadna andar ka bojh kam karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar mein batana mushkil lag raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two short scripts for controlled disclosure without overload.
text: Do line rakh lo: (1) 'Office mein bada jhatka laga hai, par main agla kadam le raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam baith ke bataunga.' Isse baat bhi hogi aur bojh bhi manageable rahega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short line se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty-role frame mirror karna.
text: Tum zimmedari chhod nahi rahe, bas use sambhalne layak raftaar mein la rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein phir darr aata hai ki kal kuch na badla toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E se future uncertainty fear mirror karna.
text: Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Raat mein kal ka anishchit bojh bada lagta hai, isliye darr tez ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, neend toot jati hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip normalize and effort validate in local context.
text: Aise daur mein toot-ti neend aur chipki thakan aam baat hai, koi kami ka nishan nahi. Tumhare lagatar chhote kadam hi asli sambhal dikha rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda saaf lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise 3-block next-day plan देना.
text: Kal ka seedha plan: 5 min saans reset, 20 min focused apply, 10 min karz-note update. Teen block kaafi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final structural reframe: recovery takes time.
text: Rozgar aur karz ke jhatke se ubharna dheere hota hai; roz ke lagatar chhote kadam hi aage ka sahara bante hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lagta hai dheere dheere sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se today's steadiness ko tomorrow continuity se link karna.
text: Aaj ka yeh thehraav kal bhi bana raha toh bhari wave dheere dheere chhoti padti jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close par do tiny continuation steps देना without burden.
text: Sone se pehle 6 dhimi saans lo, phir kal ke 3 block kagaz pe tick-box mein likh do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam poora.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas sunn hokar leta hoon, dimaag mein wahi taane goonj rahe hain. Emotional flooding itni hai ki kuch soch hi nahi paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sequential case mein Lens F se overwhelm ki quality mirror karna.
text: Is waqt tum par itni gehri emotional wave chal rahi hai ki dimaag ko tikne ka space hi nahi mil raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas gehra sannata mehsoos ho raha hai. Yaad bhi nahi ki last baar paani kab piya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se ongoing numbness and freeze duration mirror karna.
text: Yeh halat kaafi der se bani hui lagti hai, isliye sharir aur mann dono sunn pad gaye jaise.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meeting mein boss ke taane sunne ke baad se wahi awaaz goonj rahi hai. MNC wali naukri ghar ki izzat thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se izzat-loss aur future fear mirror karna.
text: Un taanon ke saath tumhe yeh bhi lag raha hai ki parivaar ki izzat aur tumhari jagah dono khatre mein aa gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, layoff ka darr itna hai ki seedha pet mein sankuchan sa hota hai. Bas chup rehne ka mann karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk warm line + Lens C se family-honour burden mirror.
text: Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tum akela panic nahi, parivaar ki izzat ka poora bojh bhi saath le kar baithe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, andar se doob raha hoon. Plan banana toh door, simple kaam bhi nahi ho rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Restatements ke baad one precise question se deepest sting identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kis cheez pe atke ho - taana, layoff ka darr, ya izzat tootne ka ehsaas?

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat tootne ka ehsaas sabse zyada tod raha hai. Core conflict yahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lagta hai framing se unspoken humiliation + isolation reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum khud ko bahut akela aur chhota mehsoos kar rahe ho, jaise tumhari poori pehchaan pe chot lagi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas 'log kya kahenge' dimag mein chalta rehta hai, isliye kisi ko batata nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol ke hisaab se short restatement only.
text: 'Log kya kahenge' ka darr tumhe aur zyada andar khinch raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chup rehta hoon toh yeh sannata aur badh jata hai.
